content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 23, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 23, 2026, focused on achieving feature parity for the Computer Use framework, advancing the LifeOps extraction plan, and hardening local inference capabilities. Significant progress was made in UI/UX consistency, cloud infrastructure stability, and CI/CD pipeline reliability.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Computer Use & Vision Parity
*   Completed extensive parity work with `trycua/cua`, including binary filesystem operations (`read_bytes`, `write_bytes`), process termination (`kill_app`), and window bounds management ([#9216](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9216), [#9215](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9215), [#9213](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9213), [#9212](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9212)).
*   Enabled on-device ASR and vision via Vulkan on Android and implemented Set-of-Marks grounding ([#9219](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9219), [#9198](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9198)).
*   Added robust input handling for modifiers and per-notch scrolling ([#9189](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9189), [#9125](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9125)).

### LifeOps Extraction & Agent Architecture
*   Promoted approval queues, pending prompts, and global pause functionality to core `@elizaos/agent` services as part of the LifeOps decomposition ([#9204](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9204), [#9197](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9197)).
*   Removed cross-layer LifeOps tokens and eradicated the aggregate LifeOps surface in the UI to improve modularity ([#9191](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9191), [#9162](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9162)).

### Local Inference & UI Enhancements
*   Optimized chat streaming with fine-grained token caps and hardened the streaming pipeline ([#9206](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9206), [#9192](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9192)).
*   Unified copy/paste contracts across chat surfaces and implemented dynamic priority ranking for home widgets ([#9185](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9185), [#9221](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9221)).
*   Consolidated cloud-frontend into `@elizaos/ui` and removed legacy game plugins to streamline the codebase ([#9093](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9093), [#9178](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9178)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#9228](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9228) fix(cloud): apps deploy status tracking.
*   [#9227](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9227) fix(ui): scroll behavior for chat reader.
*   [#9226](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9226) fix(ui): home widget rendering.
*   [#9225](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9225) fix(app): buffer stubbing for vendor-crypto.
*   [#9220](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9220) fix(cloud): resource capping for apps.
*   [#9210](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9210) fix(app): Rolldown build and cloud-api residuals.
*   [#9208](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9208) refactor(registry): de-hardcode plugin definitions.
*   [#9203](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9203) Feat: plugin trust layer.
*   [#9187](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9187) feat(ui): chat copy/paste parity.
*   [#9184](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9184) feat(computeruse): pointer primitives.
*   [#9169](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9169) refactor(ui): remove dead barrel exports.
*   [#9160](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9160) fix(core): GenerateTextResult typing.
*   [#9159](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9159) fix(core): task-scheduler error logging.
*   [#9157](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9157) feat: add @s7g-network/plugin-s7g.
*   [#9138](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9138) feat: add @s7g-network/plugin-s7g (DePIN).
*   [#9136](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9136) test(cloud-api): apps CRUD integration tests.
*   [#9108](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9108) fix: CI regressions in app views.
*   [#9101](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9101) fix(tui): re-export factory methods.
*   [#9090](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9090) registry: add elizaos-plugin-invinoveritas.
*   [#9088](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9088) Revise README.
*   [#9083](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9083) feat(plugin): security layer.
*   [#9078](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9078) fix(core): remove capped fast path.
*   [#9074](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9074) fix(core): fallback for direct-reply.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None reported.*

## NEW ISSUES
*None reported.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*None reported.*
